name: Banana Bread (Crocker)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease the bottom only of a loaf pan, 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inches or 9 x 5 x 3 inches.
3. In a 2 1/2-quart bowl, mix sugar and margarine until well combined.
4. Add eggs and stir until blended.
5. Mix in mashed bananas and water; beat for 30 seconds.
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except nuts, until just moistened.
7. Stir in chopped nuts.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 1 1/4 hours for an 8-inch loaf or 55 to 60 minutes for a 9-inch loaf.
10. Allow cooling completely before slicing.
11. Serves 1 loaf (24 slices); approximately 120 calories per slice.
Do-ahead Tip: Wrap and refrigerate no longer than 1 week.
Do not use self-rising flour in this recipe.
